steps.t: The old man in rags is near the White Hand Encampment in north-east Fangorn. The old man in rags wishes to speak with you again.

The old man in rags is near the White Hand encampment in north-east Fangorn. The old man in rags wishes to speak with you again.
The old man in rags is near the White Hand encampment in north-east Fangorn. You should say <rgb=#FF0000>no</rgb> to the old man and break…
The old man in rags is near the White Hand encampment in north-east Fangorn. You should speak with the old man in rags once more.
Wisewood is at his place near the White Hand encampment in north-eastern Fangorn. You should speak with Wisewood.
